labels.143: Tokens listing astronomical topics or scientific concepts within phrases describing fields of study or research interests.
labels.435: Positive evaluations or confirmations of whether something works well or functions properly.
labels.871: The feature fires on portions of author/person names in bibliographic citations and credits.
labels.1284: Feature activates on phrases describing common or widespread applicability across categories, domains, or contexts.
labels.4063: The feature fires on product/item names or descriptive product phrases that typically appear in e-commerce or instructional content lists.
labels.5267: The feature activates on numeric or alphanumeric codes embedded within technical specifications, product models, or dates.
labels.7290: Organization or institution names enclosed in context markers.
labels.7599: German place names and surnames, particularly from genealogical or historical contexts.
labels.8399: Acronyms or abbreviations being spelled out or expanded in parentheses.
labels.9249: The feature activates on phrases beginning with "The" followed by a noun or noun phrase.
labels.9955: Phrases where "was a" or similar constructions introduce descriptive judgments or characterizations about the preceding subject.
labels.11012: Product specifications with numerical measurements or quantities in parentheses or after size indicators.
labels.12028: Growth or increase of something over time, with the feature activating on phrases describing expansion or development.
labels.12035: Text split across lines or words broken mid-token in capitalized promotional/product descriptions.
labels.12112: Phrases expressing ability or capacity to do something meaningful or helpful.
labels.12607: Numbers or numerical data formatted with separators appearing between the marked tokens.
labels.13165: The pattern is mentions of retail, shopping, or e-commerce platforms and performance metrics.
labels.13186: Transitions from topic statements or descriptions to quoted speech or direct continuations marked by punctuation or narrative shifts.
labels.14414: Feature activates on transitions between contrasting states or time periods showing change or evolution.
labels.14802: The feature activates on four-digit numbers or numerical sequences, often years or codes with specific formatting.
labels.15493: Phrases or titles that introduce topics, reports, or sections with formal/institutional names or descriptions.
labels.15526: Acronyms or abbreviated forms enclosed in parentheses or set apart typographically.
labels.17996: Feature activates on text transitions where a sentence or clause ends and a new one begins with different content.
labels.18017: The feature fires on text containing location references or product/version names immediately preceded by context words.
